specific_question: In Q3 2024, what was the employee satisfaction score for MediConn Solution's customer service team?
answer: In Q4, 2024, Mediconn Solutions' employee satisfaction scored 7.8/10 in the quarterly survey completed by the MediConn human resources department.  Employees gave high marks for team culture but lower scores for workload management.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
